title: MP Materials Announces Expansion of Rare Earth Processing Capacity
content: MP Materials announced plans to expand rare earth processing capacity at its facility, citing strong demand from defense and electric vehicle manufacturers. The expansion is expected to increase annual output by approximately 30 percent upon completion.

title: MP Materials Reports Quarterly Production Volumes In Line With Guidance
content: MP Materials reported quarterly rare earth concentrate production volumes consistent with prior guidance. The company reaffirmed its full-year production targets.
